title: ReleaseReadiness
description: Agent review report submitted during the consensus stage, capturing the agent's assessment of whether a task artifact is ready for release.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier of the reviewing agent.

task_id.description: ID of the task being reviewed.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this review was submitted.

score.description: Overall readiness score from 0 (completely unready) to 100 (fully ready).

confidence.description: Agent's confidence in its own assessment, expressed as a value between 0.0 and 1.0.

vote.description: The agent's release vote. 'veto' overrides majority and blocks release regardless of ratio.

blockers.description: List of issues blocking release. An empty array indicates no blockers.

items.description: A specific issue that must be resolved before release.

file_path.description: Relative path to the file containing the issue.

suggested_fix.description: Recommended action to resolve this blocker.

evidence.description: Supporting evidence for this review verdict.

items.description: A single piece of evidence referenced by the agent.

reference.description: Path, URL, or identifier pointing to the evidence artifact.

summary.description: Brief summary of what this evidence shows.
